LanguageData.FCP_Gun_357_Revolver.description: The .357 Revolver is a classic, six-shot sidearm chambered for .357 Magnum rounds. Renowned for its reliability and stopping power, it is a favored weapon among lawmen and gunslingers in the wasteland.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_357_Revolver.label: .357 revolver
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_357_Revolver.tools.0.label: grip
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_357_Revolver.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_44Magnum_Revolver.description: The .44 Magnum Revolver is a powerful, six-shot sidearm chambered for .44 Magnum rounds. Renowned for its high stopping power and intimidating presence, it is a prized weapon among wasteland hunters and enforcers.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_44Magnum_Revolver.label: .44 magnum revolver
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_44Magnum_Revolver.tools.0.label: grip
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_44Magnum_Revolver.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Hunting_Revolver.description: The Hunting Revolver is a large, single-action revolver chambered for .45-70 Government rounds. Designed for hunting big game, it delivers devastating power and accuracy, but its heavy frame and slow rate of fire make it unwieldy in close combat.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Hunting_Revolver.label: hunting revolver
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Hunting_Revolver.tools.0.label: grip
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Hunting_Revolver.tools.1.label: barrel
